title: Using link item and mirrored columns for Chart view & dashboard
excerpt: Hello, we need to use some mirrored columns that i bring from another board to make my charts. When i look for this columns they are not avaliable…

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, we need to use some mirrored columns that i bring from another board to make my charts. When i look for this columns they are not avaliable…

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @hlopezvc

We’ve just released this for timeline, chart, map views/widgets!

Let us know what you think

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Glad to hear that!!!
I will try it!

posts.author: magla021 (Danijel)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Julia-monday.com when will this be rolled out for time tracking wigdet?

posts.author: Danielle-monday.com (Danielle Glickman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

At the moment this capability is not available but I definitely see the value in it! I cannot provide an ETA for this but I have passed the feedback to our dev team to review!

Danielle

posts.author: rhirschorn (Russell Hirschorn)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there any ETA on including the linked field itself in a dashboard?

posts.author: jdbourge (Jeremy Bourgeois)
posts.cookedHtml: This is significantly limiting when you have several boards with unique purposes yet contained shared and connected information. If on the charts you could Group By linked items that would significant for the ability to utilize Dashboards.

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Julia-monday.com Did this get removed was looking it for Charts?

posts.author: sl1nna (Sami Linnanvuo)
posts.cookedHtml: @Clarey if a marketplace add-on is an option, I suggest taking a look at the Analytics & Reports by Screenful, which allows creating charts from unlimited number of boards, filtering them by mirror columns, and placing those charts into Monday dashboards.
